name: Osmanli Yatirim Menkul Degerler A.S.
summary: Osmanli Yatirim Menkul Degerler A.S. provides asset management and custody services in capital markets in Turkey. The company offers investment consultancy; and operates online capital market trading platforms. Its product range includes stocks, warrants, futures and options, forex, mutual funds, pension funds, government and private sector bonds and bills, public offering of bonds, and structured derivative instruments. The company is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
